Dirk Larsen, Esq. (510) 817-0466 FRASSETTO LAW LLP dl@frassettolaw.com for Defendant.

ARGUED. Mr. Larsen contests the tentative ruling and presents arguments on the demurrer and motion to strike. Mr. Jackson agrees with the court's tentative. The Court shares its views. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

2 - DEFENDANT UNIVERSITY OF SAN FRANCISCO's MOTION TO STRIKE Amended COMPLAINT.

Defendant USF's unopposed motion to strike is GRANTED in PART AND DENIED IN PART.

(see word minutes for full details)

Order is signed.
